name: Pennsylvania Peaches'n Cream-Cheese Crustle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, pudding mix, egg and milk. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed. Pour into a greased 9 or 10-inch pie pan. Place drained peach slices over the batter.
2. In another bowl, combine cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar and 3 tablespoons reserved syrup. Beat until smooth. Spoon mixture evenly over the batter, leaving about 1 inch from the edge.
3. Sprinkle topping with remaining sugar and cinnamon. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes.
